# #11506 churn — 10-minute soak result (fresh develop build)

Method: fresh `develop` build installed via `adb install -r` (verified fresh
`lastUpdateTime`), `pm clear ai.elizaos.app`, launch, then sample
`pidof ai.elizaos.app` every 45s for 10 minutes.

Result: **pid constant (385) for the full 10 minutes — zero restarts.** The
~1–2 min process churn (part 2 of #11506) did NOT reproduce.
`02-stable-after-10min-soak.png` is the app still healthy at the 10-min mark.

Does NOT clear part 1 (stale `agent-bundle.js` re-extraction on update-over-
existing) — a clean `pm clear` install doesn't exercise that restore path.
See the #11506 comment for the precise scope + repro steps for part 1.
